report.title: e-Surveyor: Conservation Statuses
report.description: Report for a user's species data conservation statuses in e-Surveyor
report.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT 'Your area' AS category, CASE WHEN lr.local_rarity IS NOT NULL THEN lr.local_rarity ELSE 'Rare' END AS designation, CASE WHEN lr.local_rarity='Common' THEN 1 WHEN lr.local_rarity='Uncommon' THEN 2 WHEN lr.local_rarity IS NOT NULL OR lr.local_rarity='Rare' THEN 3 END AS designation_sort_order, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id AND cttl.taxon_rank_sort_order IN (290, 300) -- Macro moths AND cttl.family_taxon IN ( 'Arctiidae', 'Castniidae', 'Cossidae', 'Drepanidae', 'Endromidae', 'Erebidae', 'Geometridae', 'Hepialidae', 'Lasiocampidae', 'Limacodidae', 'Noctuidae', 'Nolidae', 'Notodontidae', 'Saturniidae', 'Sesiidae', 'Sphingidae', 'Zygaenidae' ) LEFT JOIN esurveyor.local_rarity lr ON lr.tvk=cttl.external_key AND lr.sq100km='#sq100km#' #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# AND o.record_status<>'R' AND '#sq100km#'<>'' #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'GB' AS category, mt.national_rarity AS designation, CASE WHEN mt.national_rarity='Increasing' THEN 1 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Widespread' THEN 2 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Widespread, No trend' THEN 3 WHEN mt.national_rarity='No trend' THEN 4 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Widespread, Declining' THEN 5 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Near Threatened' THEN 6 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Threatened' THEN 7 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Regionally extinct' THEN 8 WHEN mt.national_rarity='Not assessed' THEN 100 END AS designation_sort_order, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id AND cttl.taxon_rank_sort_order IN (290, 300) -- Macro moths AND cttl.family_taxon IN ( 'Arctiidae', 'Castniidae', 'Cossidae', 'Drepanidae', 'Endromidae', 'Erebidae', 'Geometridae', 'Hepialidae', 'Lasiocampidae', 'Limacodidae', 'Noctuidae', 'Nolidae', 'Notodontidae', 'Saturniidae', 'Sesiidae', 'Sphingidae', 'Zygaenidae' ) LEFT JOIN esurveyor.moth_traits mt ON mt.tvk=cttl.external_key #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# AND o.record_status<>'R' #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ), ranked AS ( SELECT category, designation, designation_sort_order, occurrence_count, species_count FROM ( SELECT category, designation, designation_sort_order, occurrence_count, species_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY category ORDER BY species_count DESC, designation ) AS category_rank, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS category_count FROM base ) s ) SELECT category, designation, designation_sort_order, SUM(occurrence_count) AS occurrence_count, SUM(species_count) AS species_count FROM ranked GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
